title: Men’s Shaving Gel Duo Pack (2 x 200ml) – Enriched with Aloe Vera for deep hydration. Helps prevent irritation and ensures a smooth, comfortable shave
features: Moisturizes and Softens: Enriched with aloe vera to keep skin hydrated and smooth for a comfortable shave. Helps reduce dryness and irritation during shaving for a soft, moisturized feel.
Protection Against Irritation: Designed to protect against shaving irritation, this gel forms a smooth lather that soothes skin and prevents razor burn, ensuring a hassle-free grooming experience.
Aloe Vera Formula: Infused with natural aloe vera, known for its soothing properties, it helps calm and nourish skin during and after shaving, leaving your face feeling refreshed and rejuvenated.
Easy Application: Comes in a convenient can with a pump dispenser for easy, mess-free application. Lathers quickly and spreads evenly, providing optimal coverage for a precise and comfortable shave.

Ideal for Sensitive Skin: Specially formulated for sensitive skin, this shave gel is free from harsh chemicals and designed to be gentle on the skin, providing a smooth shave without any discomfort or redness.
description: Product description Experience a smoother, closer shave with Nuage Shaving Gel — specially designed to protect your skin and deliver professional results every time. This rich, foaming gel softens facial hair, allowing your razor to glide effortlessly for a clean, comfortable shave with reduced irritation. Enriched with moisturizing ingredients, it helps keep your skin hydrated and refreshed long after shaving. Perfect for daily grooming and suitable for all skin types. Key Features: ✔ Provides a close and smooth shave ✔ Reduces razor burn, cuts, and skin irritation ✔ Moisturizing formula leaves skin soft and hydrated ✔ Easy to apply and rinse off ✔ Ideal for all skin types How to Use: Wet face with warm water. Apply a small amount of Nuage Shaving Gel and massage until it forms a rich lather. Shave and rinse thoroughly. Size: 200ml Brand: Nuage Type: Shaving Gel Safety Warning For external use only
